contracts.name: TruthEvent
contracts.purpose: Represent execution truth, observation signal, governance signal, rtcm_truth, and asset_quality_signal without semantic collision.
unresolved_questions: Exact migration order from legacy actual fields to typed truth events
user_confirmed_principles: Separate actual execution truth from observation and governance signals

contracts.name: StateEvent
contracts.purpose: Represent lifecycle state changes separately from truth and outcome semantics.
unresolved_questions: Canonical status enum alignment across TS and Python chains
user_confirmed_principles: State/status must not be mixed with success/truth

contracts.name: OutcomeContract
contracts.purpose: Normalize result records and map truth, state, score, and governance outcomes into one contract boundary.
unresolved_questions: Which legacy records require wrapper-only mapping vs future schema migration
user_confirmed_principles: Outcome fields require typed semantic meaning

contracts.name: MemoryLayerContract
contracts.purpose: Define OpenClaw native + DeerFlow cognitive dual-track memory and L1-L5 responsibilities.
unresolved_questions: How to expose L1-L5 across existing runtime stores without destructive migration
user_confirmed_principles: Do not reduce memory to MemoryMiddleware or Qdrant

contracts.name: MemoryScopeContract
contracts.purpose: Define memory scope, read policy, write policy, retention, quarantine, and asset-promotion gates.
user_confirmed_principles: Long-term memory cleanup requires quarantine/observation before deletion

contracts.name: AssetLifecycleContract
contracts.purpose: Define A1-A9 categories, five lifecycle tiers, required fields, state changes, verification, and tier protection.
unresolved_questions: Canonical registry target and compatibility with DPBS operation assets
user_confirmed_principles: DPBS is a sub-chain, not complete Asset System

contracts.name: AssetPromotionContract
contracts.purpose: Define asset candidate validation, scoring, CAPTURED, DERIVED, FIX, promotion, observation, and retirement rules.
unresolved_questions: Exact user confirmation threshold for Premium to Core promotion
user_confirmed_principles: RTCM final_report, governance outcome, and memory facts are candidates first, not assets

contracts.name: ModeOrchestrationContract
contracts.purpose: Define peer-mode orchestration across search, task, workflow, autonomous agent, and roundtable.
unresolved_questions: Exact wrapper placement for first non-invasive implementation
user_confirmed_principles: Five modes are peer domains and can nest/call/hand off

contracts.name: ModeInvocation
contracts.purpose: Represent each mode call, including parent/child relation, executor, permissions, and result sink.
unresolved_questions: How much legacy selected_mode compatibility to preserve
user_confirmed_principles: Child mode returns to parent by default

contracts.name: ModeCallGraph
contracts.purpose: Represent nested mode calls and cross-mode handoffs in one conversation or workflow.
unresolved_questions: Graph storage location and retention policy
user_confirmed_principles: Single selected_mode is not sufficient as final model

contracts.name: AutonomousToolRuntimeContract
contracts.purpose: Define high-autonomy tool execution policy, risk classes, backup/rollback gates, and audit events.
unresolved_questions: Exact protected operation list by tool type
user_confirmed_principles: Risk control relies on backup/rollback/audit/review rather than frequent prompting

contracts.name: PromptGovernanceContract
contracts.purpose: Define prompt precedence, SOUL.md role, GEPA/DSPy safety, prompt asset lifecycle, and rollback rules.
unresolved_questions: Canonical prompt registry and promotion test suite
user_confirmed_principles: P1 hard constraints are highest; SOUL.md is not highest override

contracts.name: NightlyReviewContract
contracts.purpose: Expand Nightly Review into full Foundation Health Review and action queue generator.
unresolved_questions: Which low-risk checks can be auto-executed without user confirmation
user_confirmed_principles: Nightly cannot directly execute high-risk repairs

contracts.name: RTCMIntegrationContract
contracts.purpose: Bind RTCM as the current main roundtable executor and define roundtable truth, asset candidates, followup, and governance mapping.
unresolved_questions: Exact user-confirmation gate for RTCM followup tasks
user_confirmed_principles: RTCM final_report is an asset candidate, not an automatic asset
